rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IRENE BORIS SHARENBROCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Reserved Date To Hear Motion For Attorney'S Fees By Moving Parties Mr. Krzemuski And Mr. Shtofman
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR. Pursuant to an 8/28/09 court order, "insofar as Mr. Krzemuski and Mr. Shtofman seek an award of reasonable attorneys' fees and costs...they are to file a petition by September 22, 2009 and have it specially set for hearing on October 8, 2009 at 1:30 p.m..." No such petition was filed by or after September 22, 2009. The October 8 date was the date on which the court would hear the petition but since there is no petition filed for the court to adjudicate, no hearing will be held on October 8.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Informal Account Of The Revocable Trust By The Conservator
